The second contestant added an "M" and then guessed "the question reminds." And finally the third contestant bought an "E" resulting in the puzzle "THE Q_ ESTION RE_ _INS." He didn't even try to guess before the buzzer sounded. Host Pat Sajak was shocked all three contestants could not solve the puzzle. And fans at home took to Twitter to voice their opinions on the matter. The puzzle came full circle and the first contestant got another crack at it.
